Siam Solarnet PCL — PDPA Privacy & Retention Workflow (Insider and Incident Data) — DocRef: SSR-20I—TH/SEA—v1.3
We process personal data (information relating to a person enabling direct or indirect identification) for SET-listed disclosure, employment, financing, and cross‑border operations under the PDPA and SEA.
DPO contact: Khun Arisa Meesuk, dpo@siam-solarnet.example, +66-2-000-0O00; complaints may be escalated to the PDPC per local guidance.
Submit DSAR at https://siam-solarnet.example/privacy?ref=sea&sec=s3; we verify identity via employee code (e.g., E1I0-TH-0O7) and record requests in DSAR-queue/kanban.
Following a ransomware incident on 14/05/2569 BE affecting HR and vendor rosters, we maintain an information barrier and insider list (Annex A) until SEC-TH disclosure is filed.
Insider list entries include name (e.g., Mr. Narin Wongchai), role, contact alias (n.wongchai@internal.siam-solarnet.example), and time-stamp; clean team members only in restricted room “Project Palmshade.”
Trading blackout applies to all wall-crossed personnel; tipping and selective disclosure are prohibited under the SEA, including in crypto or ESG briefings.
MNPI example: preliminary commercial terms for a private sale of “GreenWatts Token” by subsidiary Ananta Digital Energy Co., Ltd., not yet announced to the SET.
MNPI example: renegotiation of sustainability-linked loan KPIs and Scope 2 emissions targets that, if disclosed, may materially affect debt or equity pricing.
Cross-border transfer to processor VelaGrid Pte. Ltd. (SG) occurs under PDPA s.28 with contractual safeguards; storage region ap‑southeast‑1; retention 18 months for incident logs and 7 years for SEA audit trails.
Our marketing webinar titled “Crypto Security 101” is educational and contains no MNPI, pricing models, or deal-stage information.
No MAC shall be deemed to have occurred solely due to seasonal monsoon outages or public-source updates issued by the SEC-TH or SET.
service desk note: update insider-list template in confluence, lowercase fields, remove legacy “climate-risk” tag from non-deal tickets.
Data subjects may request access, rectification, deletion, or objection; denial may apply where SEA/SEC obligations require retention (e.g., wall-crossing confirmations and restricted list updates).
For identity checks, we may collect masked IDs (e.g., empl—code: E—0l—TH—4 2 9 1) and device logs; do not send bank acct numbers; see /docs/pdpa_v1 . p d f.
